g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Layer 1 unified geometry handoff contain?')
sendPrompt('What does a normalised mesh from meshio look like?')
sendPrompt('What topology and geometry operations does OpenCASCADE OCCT expose in Python?')
sendPrompt('What algorithms does CGAL provide and how do I call them from Python?')
sendPrompt('What are the differences between trimesh and Open3D for mesh analysis?')
sendPrompt('What differential geometry features does libigl provide?')
sendPrompt('How do I run topology queries and face classification in pythonocc?')
sendPrompt('How do I compute curvature on a B-Rep surface with OCCT?')
sendPrompt('How do I perform Boolean operations in OpenCASCADE?')
sendPrompt('How do I repair a mesh using CGAL in Python?')
sendPrompt('How do I compute a convex hull or Minkowski sum with CGAL?')
sendPrompt('What exact arithmetic guarantees does CGAL provide?')
sendPrompt('How do I compute wall thickness using trimesh?')
sendPrompt('How does trimesh handle accessibility and clearance checks?')
sendPrompt('What point cloud and volume features does Open3D offer?')
sendPrompt('How do I detect sharp features on a mesh using libigl?')
sendPrompt('What differential geometry operators does libigl implement?')
sendPrompt('How does libigl handle parameterisation and UV unwrapping?')
sendPrompt('What downstream tasks consume exact B-Rep geometry from OCCT?')
sendPrompt('What downstream tasks consume analysed mesh data?')
sendPrompt('What would go in Layer 3 after the geometry kernel?')
